dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4569 IS: Protecting Circuit Boards and Substrates Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Gallego (for himself and Mr. Justice) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to provide incentives for the domestic production of printed circuit boards.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Protecting Circuit Boards and Substrates Act.

section.header: Credit for purchase or acquisition of printed circuit boards manufactured in the United States

subsection.text: Subpart D of part IV of subchapter A of chapter 1 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by adding at the end the following new section:

section.header: Credit for purchase or acquisition of printed circuit boards manufactured in the United States

subsection.text: For purposes of section 38, the printed circuit board credit for any taxable year is an amount equal to 25 percent of the amount paid or incurred by the taxpayer during such taxable year for the purchase or acquisition of printed circuit boards which are fabricated in the United States.

paragraph.text: The term fabricated means the use of raw materials to manufacture a connected composite structure featuring electrically conductive and non-conductive elements by subtractive, additive, or other technique.
The term printed circuit board means—

subparagraph.text: a composite structure of layered electrically conductive and non-conductive materials that provides—

subclause.text: other electronics systems or subsystems, and

clause.text: electrical connections between active and passive components, and

subparagraph.text: any components embedded in the composite structure described in subparagraph (A).

subsection.text: The Secretary shall, in consultation with the Secretary of Commerce and the Secretary of Labor, promulgate such regulations and guidance as may be necessary or appropriate to carry out this section.

subsection.header: Credit To be part of general business credit
subsection.text: Subsection (b) of section 38 of such Code is amended by striking plus at the end of paragraph (40), by striking the period at the end of paragraph (41) and inserting , plus, and by adding at the end the following new paragraph:

paragraph.text: the printed circuit board credit determined under section 45BB(a).

subsection.text: The table of sections for subpart D of part IV of subchapter A of chapter 1 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by adding at the end the following new item:

toc.toc-entry: Sec. 45BB. Credit for purchase or acquisition of printed circuit boards manufactured in the United States.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to amounts paid or incurred after December 31, 2025.
